title: Enhancements to the user interface
description: Branding, layout, scope vs prompt field, Notepad file naming and controls.
success_criteria: The string 'Prompt Builder' appears nowhere in extension.js, package.json, or readme.md
project/global radio buttons are in a row and wrap when needed
Selecting a scope does not rebuild the assembled prompt field
Assembled prompt textarea is fixed height (~75px) and does not steal space from the panel list; Notepad editor uses flex to fill the Notepad tab
Notepad saves to crystalcontext_notepad.txt for Local (project) and Global (~/.claude)
Persistence across reload via file on disk
Notepad Copy copies textarea to clipboard; Clear clears file and UI
No duplicate Prompt/Notepad button row (tabs from YAML only)
notes: Micro-loop: filter by evals above; full loop uses all eval_commands in Code_Improver/config.json. Run: npm run build then each eval script, or npm run improver:loop.
